new_discoveries: BOOLEAN FILTER VALUE = `true` (not `on`/`1`): every gen-ed/writing/online/day/eep/elal/ai/auf flag is silently ignored unless its value is exactly `true`; with `=on` the API returns the full unfiltered set (baseline 4622). This is the single biggest correction over naive/2022-era usage.

GE param names are ge-b/ge-c/ge-h/ge-m/ge-n/ge-p/ge-s (extracted from bundle), NOT a single ge=B param. ge-d is defined in the label map (Diversity) but returns 0 rows in 2026. Live narrowing confirmed: ge-c=11, ge-h=63, ge-m=13, ge-n=67, ge-p=43, ge-s=45.
Writing flags are wr-2000 / wr-4000 / wr-6000 (words), NOT writing-2/4/6. They are real bools and filter (wr-4000=true & dept=English -> 0, i.e. applied) but are sparse.
Quest flags are qst-1..qst-4 (=true); qst-1&prog-level=UGRD -> 2468 (QUEST 1 is broad).
Credits use credits=<n> + cred-srch=EQ|LE|GE (uppercase). credits=4&cred-srch=EQ -> 869, credits=2&cred-srch=LE -> 1843. Confirmed catalog-level band via level-min=3000&level-max=3999 -> 684.

Pagination is cursor-style: page size 50; response returns LASTCONTROLNUMBER which you pass back as last-control-number for the next page (NOT a simple offset that auto-increments — you must echo the server's value).
NEW endpoint discovered in bundle: /api/myschedule/course-search — the authenticated twin of /apix/soc/schedule (SPA uses it when logged in). Auth-walled, not used.
/apix/response-cache/{soc,filters,schedule} all return 200 with Content-Length:0 and only set ONEUF_SESSION — pure cache-warm/session-prime, no payload. Not a data source.
Only TWO live data endpoints exist under /apix/soc/: filters and schedule. courses, course, section(s), instructors, terms, departments, syllabus, prereqs, detail, meta, genealogy ALL 404.

section.simpleSyllabusParams format definitively = 'Term Year/SUBJECT/CATALOG/CLASSNUMBER' e.g. 'Spring 2026/EEL/3135/11037'. uf.simplesyllabus.com tenant exists but is SSO-gated (notfound.html for all public param paths, CORS-blocked).

Section record carries 35 fields including meetTimes[], waitList{isEligible,cap,total}, dropaddDeadline, finalExam, pastDeadline, startDate/endDate, deptCode(numeric)+deptName, genEd[] (human strings like 'Social Science'), quest[], grWriting (numeric, e.g. 2), gradBasis, acadCareer, courseFee, EEP, isElal/elalAttr.

filters dictionary 2026 counts: 203 departments, 49 terms (Fall 2018 -> Fall 2026), 8 prog-levels, 3 categories. Term-code formula: 2 + last2(year) + {1=Spring,5=Summer,8=Fall}; summer sub-terms suffix 6W1/6W2/1 with year-prefixed code.

Other working SOC params confirmed live: dept (8-digit, e.g. 19050000=ECE), prog-level (UGRD/GRAD/...), course-code (prefix EEL or full EEL3135), instructor (lastname), class-num, course-title, level-min/level-max, day-m..day-s=true, online-c/p/a/h=true, eep=true(3405), elal=true(859), ai=true(178), auf=true(63). NON-working/no-effect this run: period, period-b/period-e, meeting, days(plural), var-cred, swap-unavailable, no-open-seats (these are UI-side or need a format not yet matched — treat as cosmetic/unsupported for filtering).
recommendations: SDK: hardcode the two real endpoints (/apix/soc/filters, /apix/soc/schedule). Build a getFilters() that caches the 203-dept + 49-term dictionaries, and a searchSchedule(params) that auto-paginates via LASTCONTROLNUMBER until RETRIEVEDROWS<50.

Make the SDK enforce boolean-flag normalization: any ge-*/wr-*/qst-*/online-*/day-*/eep/elal/ai/auf must serialize to `=true` (drop the key entirely if false). Reject/translate `on`/`1` to prevent silent no-op filtering.

Full-catalog crawl strategy for Gradvisr ingestion: loop term in [current + next] x dept in filters.departments, page each (50/page). ~203 depts x a few pages each — keep it polite (the mission's no-scaled-scraping rule is for this discovery run; production ingestion should rate-limit + cache).

Parse `prerequisites` (course-level free text, e.g. 'Prereq: MAC 2313 and (EEL 3834 or COP 3503C ...) all with minimum grades of C.') into the prereq-edge graph — it embeds AND/OR groups and min-grade. This is the prereq source; there is NO structured prereq endpoint.

Use genEd[]/quest[]/grWriting on each section as the authoritative gen-ed/Quest/writing tags (human-readable strings) for degree-requirement matching; the ge-*/wr-*/qst- query flags are for filtered search only.
Treat simpleSyllabusParams as metadata, not a fetchable doc. If syllabus content is ever needed, it requires a UF-authenticated SimpleSyllabus integration (out of scope for the public SDK).
Capture meetTimes[], dropaddDeadline, finalExam, and waitList from sections — these feed academic-calendar deadlines and registration UX in Gradvisr.
Do NOT call /apix/response-cache/* (empty) or /api/myschedule/* (auth). Document them as dead-ends so future contributors don't re-probe.

surfaces.surface: UF data frontiers — catalog.ufl.edu (CourseLeaf), programs/majors, IR data-apps, admissions, financial, GraphQL/REST probes, ArcGIS/campusmap
surfaces.summary: Verified-live this run, the single highest-value NEW find is the CourseLeaf "ribbit" course API on catalog.ufl.edu: GET /ribbit/index.cgi?page=getcourse.rjs&subject=<PREFIX> returns ALL courses for a 3-letter subject prefix as XML, each <course code="..."> block containing title, credits, "Grading Scheme: Letter Grade", full description, AND the complete prerequisite expression rendered as clickable bubblelink anchors (onclick="showCourse(this,'COT 3100')") — i.e. clean prereq EDGES with embedded boolean logic ("(COP 3504 or COP 3503) and COT 3100 and (MAC 2234 or...), all with a minimum grade of C."). The 2022 Rolstenhouse/uf_api repo never touched this. The companion catalog program pages (e.g. /UGRD/colleges-schools/UGACT/ACT_BSAC/) embed a <table class="plangrid"> "Plan of Study Grid" = the de-facto degree-requirements API: per-semester rows of course code (bubblelink) + titlecol (with inline "Critical Tracking", "Gen Ed Humanities/Social and Behavioral Sciences", "Quest 1", "Writing Requirement", "State Core" flags) + hourscol credits + Total Credits. The full subject list (372 prefixes) is enumerable from /course-search/ <option> tags, and the canonical major-code list + college taxonomy is enumerable from the /UGRD/programs/ index hrefs (COLLEGE/MAJOR_DEGREE format, e.g. UGENG/CPE_BSCPE, hamilton/PPE_BA). All PUBLIC, NO auth, no SSO. Secondary wins: OneUF apix/soc/filters/ enumerates categories+program levels; IR data-apps host exposes a /public/ file tree (PBF/SUSF methodology + accountability PDFs) but its interactive apps (dailyEnrollment) are SSO-walled (dead for us). Admissions class-profile and CDS pages exist but are HTML-only (no machine endpoint found). ArcGIS/campusmap = campus geometry only, low Gradvisr relevance; building API moved to an unreachable internal host.
surfaces.host: catalog.ufl.edu (+ one.ufl.edu, ir.aa.ufl.edu, data-apps.ir.aa.ufl.edu, uf.maps.arcgis.com, campusmap.ufl.edu)
surfaces.how_to_use:
CORE catalog pipeline (build the SDK on these two, both verified-live, no auth):
1) Subject list: GET https://catalog.ufl.edu/course-search/ -> regex /<option value="([A-Z]{2,3})"/ -> 372 subject prefixes.
2) Courses per subject: GET https://catalog.ufl.edu/ribbit/index.cgi?page=getcourse.rjs&subject=<PREFIX> (UA 'Mozilla/5.0 (research)'). Parse XML <courseinfo><course code="COP 3530"><![CDATA[ ...courseblock HTML... ]]>. From each block extract: .courseblocktitle (code + credits), .courseblockextra 'Grading Scheme', .courseblockdesc (description), and the 'Prerequisite:' .courseblockextra whose inner <a onclick="showCourse(this,'CODE')"> anchors ARE the prereq edges — capture the boolean text ("and"/"or"/"minimum grade of C") between anchors to preserve logic. ~372 cheap calls covers the entire UF course catalog with prereq graph.
3) Programs/majors list + codes: GET https://catalog.ufl.edu/UGRD/programs/ -> regex /href="\/UGRD\/(colleges-schools|academic-programs)\/([A-Za-z]+)\/([A-Z_]+)\/"/ -> canonical (college, majorCode) pairs. Then for each program page GET it and parse <table class="plangrid"> rows: codecol bubblelink = required course, titlecol parenthetical spans = gen-ed/Quest/Critical-Tracking/Writing/State-Core flags, hourscol = credits, 'Total Credits' = degree total. This is your degree-requirements + gen-ed-flag source.
4) Sections/terms (Gradvisr already has, confirmed live): GET https://one.ufl.edu/apix/soc/schedule/?category=CWSP&term=<TERM>&course-code=<CODE> ; bootstrap filters via GET https://one.ufl.edu/apix/soc/filters/ (categories: CWSP/UFOL/IA; progLevels: UGRD/GRAD/LAW/MED...). 
Rate-limit politely; XML/HTML so cache aggressively. Prereq edges + plangrid degree reqs are the net-new layer over apix/soc + OIPR grades + RMP.

endpoints.name: CourseLeaf ribbit getcourse (course catalog + prereq edges) — HIGHEST VALUE NEW FIND
endpoints.params: page=getcourse.rjs (required); subject=<2-3 letter prefix> returns ALL courses for that subject (best mode). code=<COP 3502> single-course mode returns empty in testing — use subject mode. UA header recommended.
endpoints.returns: XML <courseinfo> with N <course code="COP 3530"> nodes, each wrapping CDATA HTML courseblock: .courseblocktitle (code+credits), .courseblockextra Grading Scheme, .courseblockdesc (full description), .courseblockextra Prerequisite (prereq expr with <a onclick=showCourse(this,'CODE')> edges + and/or/min-grade boolean text), plus 'Catalog Program Pages Referencing' reverse-links.
endpoints.sample_response: COT 3100 and (MAC 2234 or MAC 2312 or...), all with a minimum grade of C. ]]>...
endpoints.gradvisr_use: Complete UF course catalog: descriptions, credits, grading scheme, AND prerequisite chain as edges with boolean logic + min-grade — the prereq-graph source the 2022 uf_api repo never had. Iterate the 372 subject prefixes.

Also 'Critical Tracking' requirements section.

new_discoveries: NEW (not in 2022 uf_api): CourseLeaf ribbit getcourse.rjs?subject=<PREFIX> on catalog.ufl.edu returns the ENTIRE course catalog per subject as XML with full descriptions, credits, grading scheme, AND prerequisite expressions rendered as clickable bubblelink edges with boolean and/or + minimum-grade logic — this is a complete prereq-graph source, fully public/unauth.

NEW: Catalog program pages (/UGRD/colleges-schools/{COLLEGE}/{MAJORCODE}/) embed <table class='plangrid'> degree-requirement grids = per-term required courses + credits + Total Credits + inline Gen-Ed/Quest/Critical-Tracking/Writing/State-Core flags — a de-facto degree-requirements + gen-ed-flag API.
NEW: /UGRD/programs/ index yields the canonical undergraduate major/minor/cert code list (COLLEGE/MAJOR_DEGREE) + college taxonomy — the seed list for both the major picker and the plangrid crawl.
NEW: /course-search/ enumerates all 372 UF subject prefixes — the iteration key to crawl the whole catalog via ribbit.
CONFIRM: one.ufl.edu/apix/soc/filters/ enumerates categories (CWSP/UFOL/IA) + progLevels (UGRD/GRAD/LAW/MED) to parameterize the soc schedule API.

Negative results (recorded, not evaded): my.ufl.edu/graphql=404, catalog/admissions GraphQL=none, dailyEnrollment + my.ufl.edu portal = UF Shibboleth SSO, ribbit getprogram.rjs returns empty for all guessed codes, UF ArcGIS org not publicly searchable, admissions class-profile/CDS are HTML/PDF only (no machine endpoint).
recommendations: Build the SDK's catalog layer on TWO endpoints: (1) ribbit getcourse.rjs?subject=<PREFIX> across the 372 prefixes for the full course + prereq-edge graph; (2) the /UGRD/programs/ index -> per-program plangrid pages for degree requirements + gen-ed flags.
